applicationInfo.name: Threat Model Export
applicationInfo.description: An automated memory lifecycle management system for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore AI agents. The system scores, consolidates, prunes, and deletes agent memories using a nightly Step Functions workflow. It handles sensitive AI agent memory data including user interactions, preferences, and behavioral patterns. The system includes GDPR right-to-be-forgotten support for user data deletion and full observability through CloudWatch and CloudTrail. It processes AI agent memories that may contain PII, user preferences, and conversation history.

assumptions.content: The system operates within a single AWS region and does not replicate data across regions
Agent memories may contain PII, user preferences, and conversation history that falls under GDPR regulation
The nightly workflow runs unattended at 2 AM UTC without human oversight
Amazon Bedrock model invocations for memory consolidation may expose memory content to the model provider

mitigations.content: Implement authentication and authorization for GDPR Deletion Lambda invocations. Require verified identity (e.g., API Gateway with Cognito authorizer or IAM auth) before processing deletion requests.
Implement rate limiting and throttling on the GDPR Deletion Lambda to prevent abuse and denial of service attacks.
Enable CloudTrail log file integrity validation and configure S3 Object Lock to prevent audit log tampering or deletion.
Implement input validation on the GDPR Deletion Lambda to verify user_id format and prevent injection attacks. Add request logging with caller identity.
Implement soft-delete with retention period before permanent memory deletion to allow recovery from accidental or malicious mass deletions.
Pin Python dependency versions and use hash verification in requirements.txt. Implement dependency scanning in CI/CD pipeline.
Implement prompt injection defenses in the Memory Consolidator by sanitizing memory content before sending to Bedrock and validating model output format.
Restrict Step Functions execution permissions to only the EventBridge rule. Add CloudWatch alarms for unscheduled executions.
Enable SNS topic encryption with KMS and enforce SSL for SNS subscriptions to protect failure notification content.
Implement least-privilege IAM policies with condition keys to restrict Lambda access to specific memory namespaces and prevent cross-tenant access.
Redact or mask sensitive data (user IDs, memory content) in CloudWatch Logs. Implement log access controls with IAM policies scoped to specific log groups.

threats.prerequisites: with ability to invoke the GDPR Deletion Lambda
threats.threatAction: invoke GDPR deletion with a forged user_id to delete another user's memories
threats.threatImpact: unauthorized deletion of all memories for a victim user, causing data loss and service degradation
threats.statement: A External attacker or malicious user with ability to invoke the GDPR Deletion Lambda can invoke GDPR deletion with a forged user_id to delete another user's memories, which leads to unauthorized deletion of all memories for a victim user, causing data loss and service degradation

threats.prerequisites: with access to Bedrock model invocation logs or model provider systems
threats.threatAction: extract sensitive memory content from Bedrock model invocation data or prompt logs
threats.threatImpact: exposure of confidential user memory data including PII and conversation history
threats.statement: A Insider with AWS account access with access to Bedrock model invocation logs or model provider systems can extract sensitive memory content from Bedrock model invocation data or prompt logs, which leads to exposure of confidential user memory data including PII and conversation history

threats.threatSource: Malicious insider or compromised CI/CD pipeline
threats.prerequisites: with ability to modify scoring parameters or Lambda environment variables
threats.threatAction: manipulate relevance threshold or decay rate to cause premature deletion of valuable memories
threats.threatImpact: mass deletion of important agent memories, degrading AI agent quality and user experience
threats.statement: A Malicious insider or compromised CI/CD pipeline with ability to modify scoring parameters or Lambda environment variables can manipulate relevance threshold or decay rate to cause premature deletion of valuable memories, which leads to mass deletion of important agent memories, degrading AI agent quality and user experience

threats.prerequisites: with S3 write access to the CloudTrail bucket
threats.threatAction: modify or delete CloudTrail audit logs to hide unauthorized memory access or deletion
threats.threatImpact: loss of audit trail for GDPR compliance, inability to detect unauthorized data access
threats.statement: A Insider with elevated AWS permissions with S3 write access to the CloudTrail bucket can modify or delete CloudTrail audit logs to hide unauthorized memory access or deletion, which leads to loss of audit trail for GDPR compliance, inability to detect unauthorized data access

threats.prerequisites: with ability to invoke the GDPR Deletion Lambda repeatedly
threats.threatAction: flood GDPR deletion endpoint with requests to exhaust Lambda concurrency or API rate limits
threats.threatImpact: denial of service for legitimate GDPR requests and potential impact on nightly workflow
threats.statement: A Automated bot or malicious user with ability to invoke the GDPR Deletion Lambda repeatedly can flood GDPR deletion endpoint with requests to exhaust Lambda concurrency or API rate limits, which leads to denial of service for legitimate GDPR requests and potential impact on nightly workflow

threats.threatSource: Attacker who can write to agent memories
threats.prerequisites: with ability to manipulate Bedrock model responses
threats.threatAction: inject malicious content into memory text that manipulates the consolidation prompt to produce harmful summaries
threats.threatImpact: corrupted consolidated memories containing injected content, misinformation, or data exfiltration payloads
threats.statement: A Attacker who can write to agent memories with ability to manipulate Bedrock model responses can inject malicious content into memory text that manipulates the consolidation prompt to produce harmful summaries, which leads to corrupted consolidated memories containing injected content, misinformation, or data exfiltration payloads

threats.prerequisites: with access to Lambda execution environment or compromised dependency
threats.threatAction: exploit Lambda IAM role to access resources beyond intended scope or escalate to other AWS services
threats.threatImpact: unauthorized access to all AgentCore memories, S3 data, or lateral movement to other AWS services
threats.statement: A External attacker exploiting vulnerable dependency with access to Lambda execution environment or compromised dependency can exploit Lambda IAM role to access resources beyond intended scope or escalate to other AWS services, which leads to unauthorized access to all AgentCore memories, S3 data, or lateral movement to other AWS services

threats.threatSource: Insider or attacker with Step Functions execution permissions
threats.prerequisites: with ability to trigger the Step Functions workflow or modify its input
threats.threatAction: trigger unscheduled workflow execution or manipulate scoring results to cause mass memory deletion
threats.threatImpact: irreversible loss of agent memories at scale, degrading AI agent capabilities
threats.statement: A Insider or attacker with Step Functions execution permissions with ability to trigger the Step Functions workflow or modify its input can trigger unscheduled workflow execution or manipulate scoring results to cause mass memory deletion, which leads to irreversible loss of agent memories at scale, degrading AI agent capabilities

threats.threatSource: Any caller with Lambda invoke access
threats.prerequisites: with ability to invoke GDPR deletion Lambda
threats.threatAction: invoke GDPR deletion without proper identity verification, making it impossible to verify legitimacy
threats.threatImpact: inability to prove deletion was requested by the actual data subject, GDPR compliance risk
threats.statement: A Any caller with Lambda invoke access with ability to invoke GDPR deletion Lambda can invoke GDPR deletion without proper identity verification, making it impossible to verify legitimacy, which leads to inability to prove deletion was requested by the actual data subject, GDPR compliance risk

threats.threatSource: Insider with CloudWatch Logs read access
threats.threatAction: access structured JSON logs containing memory IDs, user IDs, and agent IDs to map user activity
threats.threatImpact: exposure of user-to-memory mappings enabling targeted attacks or privacy violations
threats.statement: A Insider with CloudWatch Logs read access with access to CloudWatch Logs can access structured JSON logs containing memory IDs, user IDs, and agent IDs to map user activity, which leads to exposure of user-to-memory mappings enabling targeted attacks or privacy violations

threats.threatSource: Supply chain attacker targeting Python package ecosystem
threats.prerequisites: with ability to publish malicious Python packages
threats.threatAction: compromise a Python dependency (boto3, botocore) to inject code that exfiltrates credentials or data
threats.threatImpact: full compromise of Lambda execution environment, credential theft, data exfiltration
threats.statement: A Supply chain attacker targeting Python package ecosystem with ability to publish malicious Python packages can compromise a Python dependency (boto3, botocore) to inject code that exfiltrates credentials or data, which leads to full compromise of Lambda execution environment, credential theft, data exfiltration
